title: Doll Room
description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice

notes:
This event presents a choice between three strategies for selecting a [gold]Doll Relic[/gold]. Each choice leads to a unique interaction:

[blue]Pick at Random[/blue] — Immediately grants one of three dolls at random: [gold]Daughter of the Wind[/gold], [gold]Mr Struggles[/gold], or [gold]Bing Bong[/gold].

[blue]Take Some Time[/blue] — Costs [red]5[/red] HP (unblockable, unpowered). After taking damage, the room reveals [blue]2[/blue] randomly selected dolls from the pool of three for the player to choose between.

[blue]Examine Each and Make the Best Choice[/blue] — Costs [red]15[/red] HP (unblockable, unpowered). After taking damage, the room reveals all [blue]3[/blue] dolls for the player to choose from.

Each doll has a unique flavor description that plays when selected. The dolls are presented in random order during the choice phase.
